nasb.text: Jonathan said to David, “Come, and let us go out into the field.” So both of them went out to the field.

esv.text: And Jonathan said to David, “Come, let us go out into the field.” So they both went out into the field.

cnv.text: 約拿單對大衛說：“你來，我們出到田裡去吧！”他們二人就出到田裡去了。

ccb.text: 约拿单说：“我们一起到田野去吧。”于是，二人一起去了田野。
